Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Checklist Completed occurs in the entire event log
Percentage of cases where SW-Checklist Completed is followed by SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Frequency of SW-Checklist Completed appearing before SW-Awaiting AE Assignment across all variants
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Ratio of SW-Checklist Completed to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation occurrences
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of process variants that include SW-Checklist Completed as a mandatory step after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Checklist Completed in comparison to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Checklist Completed appears exactly once, indicating successful and non-redundant completion
Metric: the average of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed events performed by the SYSTEM performer relative to total SYSTEM-performed activities
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all cases

Name: Ratio of SW-Checklist Completed to Manuscript Export Succeeded occurrences, reflecting submission-to-completion efficiency
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Checklist Completed occurs after a delay-indicating activity (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days), highlighting timeliness of compliance
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Checklist Completed' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days'

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed occurrences that are not immediately preceded by a checklist reminder activity (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days or SW-Checklist Completion now due)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Checklist Completed'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity != 'SW-Checklist Completion now due'"}"

Name: Number of SW-Checklist Completed events that occur without any prior checklist-related reminder activities
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Checklist Completed'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity != 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' and activity != 'SW-Checklist Completion now due'"}"

Name: Percentage of SW-Checklist Completed that directly lead to progression into the reviewer assignment phase (i.e., followed by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection or SW-AE Assign Reviewers within the same case)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Checklist Completed'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' or activity == 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'"}"

Name: Number of variants in which SW-Checklist Completed is immediately followed by an EIC decision path (e.g., SW-Awaiting EIC Decision or direct rejection/acceptance)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'SW-Checklist Completed'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': "activity == 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Reject' or activity == 'SW-EIC Accept' or activity == 'SW-EIC Major Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Minor Revision' or activity == 'SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit'"}"
